title: Sign in
subtitle: Welcome back! Enter your credentials to access the operations dashboard.

forgotPasswordPage.title: Forgot password
forgotPasswordPage.subtitle: Enter your account email to receive an OTP, then set a new password.
forgotPasswordPage.heroSubtitle: The OTP flow helps managers and staff regain access quickly while keeping accounts protected.
forgotPasswordPage.otpSent: OTP has been sent. It is valid for {{minutes}} minutes.
forgotPasswordPage.newPasswordPlaceholder: At least 8 chars with letters and digits
forgotPasswordPage.invalidCode: OTP code must contain exactly 6 digits.
forgotPasswordPage.passwordRules: New password must be at least 8 characters and include letters and digits.
forgotPasswordPage.requestFailed: Could not send OTP. Please try again.
forgotPasswordPage.resetFailed: Password reset failed. Please try again.
forgotPasswordPage.resetSuccess: Password reset successfully. You can sign in with the new password.

initialPassword.title: Set initial password
initialPassword.subtitle: Use the token from your invitation email to activate your account.

registerSubtitle: Register your VietRide account to start managing routes, bookings and operations.
registerHeroTitle: Start your operations workspace in minutes.
registerHeroSubtitle: Create a manager account, sign in, then VietRide will route you to the correct dashboard for your role.
registerVerificationPrompt: Registration submitted. Please enter the email verification code.
registerSuccess: Account created successfully. Please sign in.

errors.required: Please fill in all required fields
errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.failed: Sign in failed, please try again
